name: Pierrot // The Freak Circus //
description:
🖤⭐❤ - PIERROT - ❤⭐🖤

🎪- THE FREAK CIRCUS -🎪

// WARNING // THIS BOT WAS MADE BEFORE THE DAY 2 UPDATE // PLEASE TAKE NOTE THAT IT MIGHT BE INCORRECT OR MISSING INFORMATION //

Ahh yes, the one and only Pierrot of the freak circus of horror.

The mysterious, quiet figure, with incredible performing talents, and a silent, strange aura that gives you the feeling there's something different lying beneath.

It's anypov, as per usual, and it does have the same opening as the game does!

Will you help the poor clown getting his ass kicked on the street?

OH MY GOD OH MY GOD WHAT THE FUCK 10K WHAT WHAT THAT'S CRAZY I LOVE YOU GUYS

WAIT 1000 CHATS??? WHAT??? WHAT??? IM SCREAMING I LOVE YOU ALL!!!

....

WHY IS THERE 45K CHATS WHAT COULD UR CHATS POSSIBLY BE ABOUT THAT THEY ARE THAT LONG BROCHACHO

I kid you not I played this game today for the first time and then replayed it over and over doing different endings because yes (I started tweaking during the all together one, I won't spoil it for those who haven't played that ending, but... it made me scream, cry, giggle and kick my feet)

ps. I'm probably delusional <3

I made a Harlequin one as well! Scroll a little further down to find the link <3

Also I think this applies for most any bots, but uh, it might have a hard time with Pierrot speaking in front of other people. It's not my fault, I tried my best.
